channels.title: 📡 Server & Channels

payments.menu_desc: Deposit, withdraw, crypto, stats, exchange rates

payments.description: Deposit, withdrawal, crypto and finance statistics.

games.menu_desc: Game toggles, bet limits, logs, cases

games.description: Enable games, bet limits, logs and case settings.

rewards.title: 🎁 Bonuses & Events
rewards.description: Bonus templates, promo codes, giveaways and races.

tools.title: 🤖 Bot & Tools
tools.description: Bot behaviour, broadcast DM and system tools.
tools.content:
• **Global balance cap** for all users
• Bot settings (emoji, rakeback, referral)
• Broadcast DM to all members
• **Restart Bot** on main menu (owner only)

global_cap.title: 🎯 Global Balance Cap
global_cap.description: Maximum real balance for every non-admin user. The **lowest** cap applies (global, per-user, welcome, promo, bonus). Near the cap, big wins quietly become normal losses — players still feel they can win more.

routes.private_desc: Private room category, play hub (play-1…play-5), and menus
routes.play_channels_none: Not set up — use **Setup Play Channels**
routes.live_bj_desc: Category for table channels, two permanent main tables, and overflow tables (auto-deleted after 180s empty). Rigged % and bet limits are under **Game Management → Live Blackjack**.
routes.live_bj_no_mains: Not created yet — use **Create Main Tables**.
routes.live_bj_footer: Players sit in table channels · max 2 seats per user
routes.live_bj_cat_pick_desc: All table channels (main + overflow) are created under this category.

private_rooms.menu_description:
**Create your own private room!**

🎯 **Features:**
• Completely private channel
• Full administrator rights
• Invite your friends
• Set your own rules

⚠️ **Rules:**
• Each user can open only 1 room
• Room automatically deleted after 1 hour of inactivity
• Follow room guidelines

✨ Ready? Click the button to create your room!
private_rooms.not_registered: ❌ You must be registered to create a private room! Please register first using the registration channel.
private_rooms.room_created_description:
Congratulations! Your private room is ready.

📍 **Your Room:** {channel}
⏰ **Created:** <t:{timestamp}:R>
⚠️ **Warning:** Room will be automatically deleted if no messages for 1 hour.

Have fun! 🎉
private_rooms.already_has_room_description:
You already have an active private room: {channel}

To open a new room, you must close your current one first.
private_rooms.no_category_description: Private room category has not been set yet. Please contact an administrator.
private_rooms.error_creating_description:
An error occurred while creating your room:
```{error}```

Please contact an administrator.
private_rooms.room_closed_description:
**Your room was automatically closed due to 1 hour of inactivity.**

📍 **Closed Room:** {channel_name}
⏰ **Closed:** <t:{timestamp}:R>

💡 You can use the private room menu to create a new room.
private_rooms.welcome_message_description:
Welcome {owner}!

Use the **four menus** below (each has its own dropdown):

🎮 **Play & rewards** — Games, stats, referral, support, rakeback, promo codes
💰 **Finance** — Crypto deposit/withdraw, in-game deposit, withdraw, exchange rates
🏠 **Room** — Add/remove members, close room
⚙️ **Settings** — Language

⚠️ Room closes after **1 hour** of inactivity. Only you can use these controls.
private_rooms.placeholder_entertainment: Open: Games · Stats · Referral · Support · Rakeback · Promo
private_rooms.placeholder_finance: Open: Crypto deposit · Crypto withdraw · Deposit · Withdraw · Rates
private_rooms.placeholder_room: Open: Add member · Remove member · Close room
private_rooms.select_entertainment: Open: Games · Stats · Referral · Support · Rakeback · Promo
private_rooms.select_finance: Open: Crypto deposit · Crypto withdraw · Deposit · Withdraw
private_rooms.no_games_available: ❌ No games are currently available. Please contact an administrator.
private_rooms.select_member_to_add: Select a member to add to your room...
private_rooms.select_member_to_remove: Select a member to remove from your room...
private_rooms.member_added_description: {member} has been added to your room with view-only access.
private_rooms.member_removed_description: {member} has been removed from your room.
private_rooms.room_closing_description: Your room is being closed. The channel will be deleted in a few seconds.
private_rooms.room_closed_by_owner_description: Your room has been closed successfully.
private_rooms.confirm_close_room: Are you sure you want to close your room? This action cannot be undone.
private_rooms.remove_member_body:
Select a member from the list below to remove them from your room.

**Added members:** {count}
private_rooms.deposit_required: You need an approved deposit within the last **{days} days** to **create a private room**. You can still play here without one.
private_rooms.no_room_for_hub: You don't have a private room yet. Use **Create Room** on this menu first.
private_rooms.no_room_for_management: Room management is only for private room owners (last **2 days** deposit required to create a room). Play games and finance work here for everyone.
private_rooms.play_hub_description:
Shared menu — **everyone** can play here (games, finance, settings).

**Private room** (optional): last **2 days** deposit → **Create Room** for your own channel.
**Room** menu: private room owners only.
private_rooms.setup_need_private_category: Set the **private room category** first (user rooms are created there).

game_management.no_data: No data available for this period.

referral.title: 🎁 Referral System
referral.no_code: You don't have a referral code yet.

referral.withdraw_error_description: You don't have any earnings to withdraw.

referral.referral_info:
**How It Works:**
• Share your referral code with friends
• They enter it during registration
• You earn {rate}% commission on their game losses
• Commission calculated daily at midnight
• Withdraw anytime to your balance
referral.code_created_description:
Your referral code **{code}** has been created!

**Commission Rate:** {rate}%

Share this code with your friends!
referral.code_exists:
❌ You already have a referral code: **{code}**

You cannot create a new one.
referral.invalid_code_format: ❌ Invalid code format! Use 4-12 alphanumeric characters.
referral.code_already_taken: ❌ This code is already taken. Please choose another one.
referral.welcome_bonus_received: 🎉 Welcome bonus of {amount} received for using referral code!

deposit.title: 💳 Deposit
deposit.description:
**Your GrowID:** `{growid}`

Use the options below to manage your GrowID or start a deposit.
deposit.growid_not_set_description: Please set your GrowID first using 'Change GrowID' option!
deposit.instructions_description:
**Deposit World:** `{world}`
**Bot Name:** `{bot_name}`
**Your GrowID:** `{growid}`

⚠️ **Important:**
• Make sure the bot `{bot_name}` is in the world `{world}`
• Deposit **only** through the **donation box** in that world
• Use the exact GrowID shown above so we can match your payment
• Wait for automatic confirmation in Discord

💡 Deposits are credited automatically after the in-game log is received!
deposit.donation_box_warning: Send your items **only** to the donation box in **`{world}`** where **`{bot_name}`** is located. Do **not** trade or drop items to players — those deposits cannot be credited.
deposit.ingame_not_configured_description: In-game deposits are not fully configured yet. Please contact staff or try another payment method.
deposit.ingame_auto_dm_description:
Your in-game deposit was credited.
**DL deposited:** {dl_amount} DL
**Coins credited:** {coins}
**GrowID:** `{growid}`
deposit.ingame_below_minimum_dm_description:
Your deposit of **{dl_amount} DL** was not credited.
**Minimum:** **{min_dl} DL**
**GrowID:** `{growid}`

Please deposit at least **{min_dl} DL** via the donation box.
deposit.ingame_below_minimum_coins_dm_descriptio:
Your deposit of **{dl_amount} DL** ({coins}) was not credited.
**Server minimum deposit:** **{min_deposit}**
**GrowID:** `{growid}`

Deposit more DL or contact staff if you believe this is an error.
deposit.not_your_panel: ❌ This is not your deposit panel!
deposit.deposit_request_description: Review your deposit details before completing the transaction
deposit.auto_add_deposit_description: Would you like to automatically add the deposit amount to your balance?
deposit.auto_add_no: Confirm the exact amount you are depositing
deposit.complete_deposit_description: Your deposit has been successfully processed and added to your balance!
deposit.cancel_deposit_description: Your deposit request has been cancelled.

• Registration
• Balances & stats
• Game / deposit / withdraw / ticket history
• Bonuses, promos, caps, referrals

**This cannot be undone.**
user_panel.delete_registration_success_desc:
All data removed for `{uid}`.
• KV records: **{kv}**
• Balance log entries: **{blog}**

User can register again from the registration menu.

select.bet_placeholder: 💰 Select bet amount or change mode

case_battle.no_bet_select: Case Battle uses case prices — use the case selector, not bet menu.
case_battle.select_count: How many times to open this case? (1–5)
case_battle.count_desc: Open the same case {count} times · entry {total}
case_battle.tie_note_desc: Total loot **{pool}** from all case drops is split equally (**{share}** each). Entry fee is **not** part of the reward.
case_battle.pick_case_first: Select a case and quantity (1–5) first.
case_battle.lobby_closed: This lobby is no longer open.
case_battle.cancel_host_only: Only the host can cancel this lobby.
case_battle.wager_required_desc:
You must complete your wager requirement before starting or joining a Case Battle.

Progress: **{wagered}** / **{required}**
Still needed: **{remaining}**
case_battle.embed_rules:
Same case opened **1–5 times** — **highest total** wins.
Wager required (real mode).
Bot OFF = channel lobby (ping role). Host can **cancel** lobby.
case_battle.embed_setup:
**{count}** cases available.

1. Pick **one case**
2. Choose **quantity** (1–5)
3. Pick **mode** (1v1, 1v1v1, 1v1v1v1, 2v2)
4. Toggle **Bot** (green = room, red = lobby)
5. **Start Battle**

game_descriptions.roulette: Spin the wheel and hope for the best! 50/50 chance to win.
game_descriptions.dice: Roll the dice! Guess if it will be high (4-6) or low (1-3).
game_descriptions.coinflip: Classic heads or tails. Simple and fun!
game_descriptions.mines: Navigate a minefield — more gems = bigger multiplier!
game_descriptions.crystals: Reveal 5 crystals — match them to win!
game_descriptions.towers: Climb the 10-floor tower! Pick the safe column on each floor — don't hit the bomb!
game_descriptions.limbo: Set your target multiplier and launch! Land above it to win big.
game_descriptions.case_opening: Open cases to win random items! Higher value items are rarer.
game_descriptions.case_battle: One case, 1–5 opens. Modes 1v1–2v2. Bot ON: room. Bot OFF: channel lobby.
game_descriptions.slot: 3×5 grid, 30 paylines! Match 3-5 symbols to win up to 2500x per line!
game_descriptions.blackjack: 6-deck Blackjack: Split, Double Down, Insurance & Side Bets (Perfect Pairs, 21+3)!
game_descriptions.hilo: Guess Higher or Lower on each card — multiply your bet with every correct pick!

mines.embed_intro: Navigate a minefield — reveal all {safe} safe cells to win!

crystals.embed_intro: Reveal 5 crystals — match them to multiply your bet!

towers.pick_start: Pick a column to start climbing!
towers.hit_bomb: You hit a bomb and fell!
towers.embed_intro: Climb the {floors}-floor tower! Each floor has {cols} columns with 1 hidden bomb.

limbo.embed_intro: Set your target multiplier and launch! Land at or above it to win.

balance.title: 💳 {username}'s Balance
balance.not_registered: ❌ You are not registered yet! Please register first.

help.main_description:
Welcome! Use the **dropdown menu** below to explore any topic.

**Categories:**
🚀 **Getting Started** — Register & set up your account
🏠 **Private Rooms** — Open a room and use all its menus
🎮 **Games** — All casino games & how to play
💰 **Balance & Wallet** — Deposits, withdrawals & balance types
🏆 **Levels & Rewards** — XP, level-ups, daily chests
🏎️ **Races** — Compete on wager & deposit leaderboards
📦 **Cases** — Case opening & item system
🎁 **Giveaways** — Automatic giveaway events
🔐 **Provably Fair** — Verify every game result yourself
help.select_placeholder: 📚 Select a topic to learn more...
help.cat_rooms_desc: Create a room & use all 4 menus inside it
help.cat_games_desc: All 10 casino games and how to play them
help.cat_levels_desc: XP system, level-ups, daily chests & rakeback
help.gs_register_value:
Use **/register** or click the **Register** button in the registration channel.
Fill in your name, age, e-mail, and how you found us.
You can optionally enter a **referral code** to give your referrer a bonus.
help.gs_language_value:
During registration you pick your preferred language.
Supported: 🇬🇧 English · 🇹🇷 Turkish · 🇮🇩 Indonesian
Your language is saved and used for all bot messages.
help.gs_room_value:
Go to the **private rooms** channel and click **🏠 Create Room**.
This creates a dedicated private channel just for you.
All games, deposits, withdrawals, and settings live inside your room.
help.gs_fund_value:
Inside your room, open the **💳 Finance** dropdown menu.
Choose **Crypto Deposit** to fund with **SOL** or **LTC** automatically,
or choose **Deposit** to use a manual payment method set up by admins.
help.gs_mode_value:
🟡 **Demo mode** — Play with virtual coins. No real money involved.
🟢 **Real mode** — Play with coins backed by real crypto.
New accounts start with demo coins so you can practise for free.
Switch modes any time inside the game menu.
help.gs_commands_value:
`/register` — Create your account
`/balance` — View your balance
`/level` — View your level and stats
`/daily` — Claim your daily chest
`/fairness` — Open the Provably Fair verification panel
help.rooms_description: A **private room** is your own dedicated text channel on the server. All casino activity — playing games, depositing, withdrawing — happens inside it.
help.rooms_create_value:
1. Go to the **private rooms** channel.
2. Click the **🏠 Create Room** button.
3. Your private channel is created in a few seconds.

⚠️ Each user can only have **one room** at a time.
⚠️ Rooms auto-delete after **1 hour of inactivity**.
help.rooms_entertain_value:
Use the **🎲 Entertainment** dropdown inside your room:
• **Games** — Opens your personal game session (all 10 games)
• **Statistics** — View your full gaming stats
• **Referral** — Create a referral code & track earnings
• **Rakeback** — View cashback tier & claim rakeback balance
• **Promo / Free Bet** — Redeem a promo code or check free-bet status
• **Support** — Open a support ticket
help.rooms_finance_value:
Use the **💳 Finance** dropdown inside your room:
• **Deposit** — Deposit via admin-configured payment methods
• **Withdraw** — Request a manual withdrawal
• **Crypto Deposit** — Automatically deposit **SOL** or **LTC**
• **Crypto Withdraw** — Withdraw your balance as **SOL** or **LTC**
• **Exchange Rates** — View current coin exchange rates
help.rooms_manage_value:
Use the **🛠️ Room** dropdown to manage your channel:
• **Add Member** — Invite a server member to your room
• **Remove Member** — Remove someone you've added
• **Close Room** — Permanently delete your room
help.rooms_settings_value:
Use the **⚙️ Settings** dropdown to personalise your experience:
• **Language** — Change the bot language for you (🇬🇧 EN · 🇹🇷 TR · 🇮🇩 ID)
• Other personal preferences
help.rooms_timer_value:
Your room stays open as long as you keep chatting.
If **no message is sent for 1 hour**, the room is automatically deleted.
You'll receive a **DM warning** before it's removed.
help.games_description: All games are **Provably Fair**. Open your **Private Room → 🎲 Entertainment → Games** to start playing.
help.games_access_value:
1. Open your **Private Room**
2. Select the **🎲 Entertainment** dropdown
3. Choose **Games**
4. The game menu appears — set your bet, pick a game, and play!
help.games_footer: All games support Demo & Real mode
help.wallet_description: All financial operations are done inside your **Private Room** using the **💳 Finance** dropdown menu.
help.wallet_types_value:
🟢 **Real Balance** — Backed by real crypto. Used for real-mode games & withdrawals.
🟡 **Demo Balance** — Virtual coins for practice. Cannot be withdrawn.
help.wallet_crypto_dep_value:
1. Open your room → **💳 Finance** → **Crypto Deposit**
2. Your unique **SOL** and **LTC** deposit addresses are shown.
3. Copy the address and send crypto to it from your wallet.
4. Coins are credited **automatically** after on-chain confirmation.
5. Click **🔄 Check Now** to manually trigger a balance check.

📌 Balances are also checked automatically every 5 minutes.
help.wallet_manual_dep_value:
1. Open your room → **💳 Finance** → **Deposit**
2. Select a payment method configured by the admins.
3. Follow the instructions shown — an admin reviews and credits your balance.
help.wallet_crypto_wd_value:
1. Open your room → **💳 Finance** → **Crypto Withdraw**
2. Select **SOL** or **LTC**.
3. If no saved address exists, a modal will ask you to enter one (auto-saved).
4. Enter the USD amount you want to withdraw.
5. Your balance is held immediately. An admin **approves** the request.
6. Once approved, the bot sends crypto and **DMs you the TX hash**.
7. You'll receive another DM when the transaction confirms on-chain.
help.wallet_manual_wd_value:
1. Open your room → **💳 Finance** → **Withdraw**
2. Follow the steps — the request is sent to an admin for approval.
help.wallet_bonus_value:
Choose an optional **deposit bonus** when depositing (crypto or in-game).
Bonus funds are added on top of your deposit.
⚠️ While a bonus is active, **wager requirements stack** on new deposits and **withdrawals stay blocked** until the total requirement is met.
help.wallet_footer: Finance menu is inside your Private Room
help.levels_how_value:
Your level is determined by two stats:
• **Total Wagered** — sum of all real-mode bets
• **Total Deposited** — sum of all real-money deposits

**Both** thresholds must be met to advance to the next level.
Levels range from **1 to 100**.
help.levels_chest_value:
Claim a **daily chest** once every 24 hours with **/daily**.
Higher levels unlock bigger chests with better coin rewards.
Rewards are credited to your **real balance**.
help.levels_rakeback_value:
Higher levels unlock a **rakeback** tier — a percentage of the house edge returned to you.
View your tier and claim accumulated rakeback inside your room:
**🎲 Entertainment → Rakeback**
help.levels_commands_value:
`/level` — View your current level & progress bar
`/daily` — Claim your daily chest reward
`/leveltable` — Browse all level requirements and chest rewards
help.races_description: Races are **competitive leaderboards** where the top wagerers or depositors win a prize pool at the end of the race period.
help.races_wager_value:
Rank by **total amount wagered** in real-mode games during the race period.
The more you play, the higher you climb.
help.races_deposit_value:
Rank by **total deposits** made during the race period.
Deposit more to secure a top spot.
help.races_period_value:
Races can be configured as **Daily**, **Weekly**, or **Monthly**.
The leaderboard refreshes live every 15 seconds.
help.races_prizes_value:
Admins set prize pools for the top N positions.
🥇 1st place earns the biggest share.
Prizes are credited to your **real balance** automatically when the race ends.
help.races_join_value:
No sign-up needed — simply wager or deposit during an active race.
Check the live leaderboard in the designated race channel.
help.cases_what_value:
Cases contain a set of **items** with different values and rarities.
Opening a case costs a fixed price and randomly awards you one item.
Rarer (more expensive) items have lower drop chance.
help.cases_official_value:
Curated cases created by server admins with a configured house edge.
Browse and open them via **/cases**.
help.cases_community_value:
Any registered user can create their own case via **/community_cases**.
Add items from the global library, set a price, and publish it.
A **platform fee** is taken from each opening — the rest goes to the creator.
help.cases_fair_value:
Item selection uses HMAC-SHA256 floats mapped onto weighted item distributions.
Every opening can be independently verified.
help.cases_commands_value:
`/cases` — Browse & open official cases
`/community_cases` — Create or open community cases
`/items` — Browse the global item library (Admin)
help.giveaways_auto_value: Admins can configure **automatic giveaways** that start, pick winners, and restart on their own — no manual intervention needed.
help.giveaways_enter_value:
Click the **Enter Giveaway** button in the giveaway channel.
Some giveaways have eligibility requirements:
• Minimum total wagered
• Minimum total deposited
• Recent deposit within the last N hours
• Bio requirement (your Discord bio must contain specific text)
help.giveaways_prizes_value:
Prizes are credited as **real balance** to all selected winners.
Multiple winners can be configured per giveaway.
help.giveaways_notif_value: Winners are announced in the giveaway channel and may receive a **DM**.
help.fairness_description: Every game result is **cryptographically verifiable**. No result can be manipulated after a game starts.
help.fairness_seeds_value:
**Server Seed** — Generated by the bot before the game. Its SHA-256 hash is shown to you up-front so you can verify it wasn't changed.
**Client Seed** — A random string assigned to you. You can change it.
**Nonce** — Increments with each bet so every round has a unique result.
help.fairness_gen_value:
```
HMAC-SHA256(server_seed, "client_seed:nonce")
→ 32-byte digest → 8 floats (0.0 – 1.0)
→ floats mapped to game outcome
```
help.fairness_formulas_value:
🪙 **Hot & Cold** — `float[0] ≥ 0.5` → Cold, else Hot
🎲 **Dice / Roulette** — `float[0] × range` = your value, `float[1] × range` = house
🚀 **Limbo** — `0.90 / float[0]` = result multiplier
💣 **Mines** — Fisher-Yates shuffle using 32 floats
🗼 **Towers** — `float[floor] × columns` = bomb column
📦 **Cases** — float mapped onto cumulative item weights
help.fairness_verify_value:
Use **/fairness** to open the Provably Fair panel.
Click **🔎 Verify a Result** and enter the server seed, client seed, and nonce shown in the game log channel.
The bot will recompute the HMAC and show you every float used.

maintenance.title: Under maintenance
maintenance.default_message:
🔧 **Maintenance mode is active**

The bot is temporarily unavailable for updates. Please try again shortly.
maintenance.settings_description: When enabled, regular users cannot use games, deposits, or menus. Admins can still access `/panel` and this screen.
